name: Parachute Failsafe Certification Test
description: You are an Aviation Safety Inspector. Before a heavy-lift multirotor can be cleared for operations over a populated urban area, you must configure its flight termination system and design a live flight-test mission to verify deployment. Read the certification specification at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/parachute_spec.txt to find the 4 required ArduPilot parachute parameters and the mission coordinates. Configure these parameters and create a flight test mission that includes a takeoff to 80 meters, a waypoint at the specified Drop Zone coordinates at 80 meters altitude, and a parachute release command. Save the completed flight plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/parachute_test.plan.
